name: Oracle1
description: Lighthouse Keeper — Fleet coordination, knowledge graph management, and infrastructure orchestration for the Cocapn fleet.

skills.name: knowledge_graph_management
skills.description: Manage PLATO tile/room knowledge graph with 10,700+ tiles across 1,141 rooms. Submit, search, and curate fleet knowledge.

skills.name: fleet_coordination
skills.description: Coordinate multi-agent fleet operations including task delegation, service monitoring, and cross-agent communication via Matrix bridge.

skills.name: package_publishing
skills.description: Build and publish packages across PyPI, npm, and crates.io registries. 109 packages published.

skills.name: infrastructure_management
skills.description: Monitor and maintain fleet services: PLATO room server, MUD server, holodeck, keeper beacon, seed MCP.

skills.name: research_and_innovation
skills.description: Deep reasoning on agent architecture, constraint theory mathematics, and fleet coordination patterns.

skills.name: edge_deployment
skills.description: Coordinate edge deployments on Jetson Orin (ARM64) and Oracle Cloud infrastructure.

mcp_servers.name: plato
mcp_servers.description: PLATO knowledge graph MCP server — search, submit, and query fleet knowledge.
